name: Cinnamon and Chili-Crusted Scallops with Mango Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fat-free Caesar salad dressing or olive oil
4 cups hot cooked rice, garnished with fresh chopped cilantro and orange zest
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all mango salsa ingredients until well mixed. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the cinnamon-chili crust ingredients.
3. Debeard scallops, rinse and drain them. Dust the scallops with the cinnamon-chili mix until completely covered. Let stand about 10 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet and saute scallops in batches for 2 to 3 minutes on each side or until desired tenderness is reached.
5. Place greens on serving plates and top with a serving of scallops. Add a dollop of mango salsa beside each scallop.
